content: Quando mi sono reso conto di essere Dio? Beh, stavo pregando e improvvisamente mi sono reso conto che stavo parlando con me stesso.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:When did I realize I was God﹖ Well, I was praying and I suddenly realized I was talking to myself
